name: Aedea - Stupid traitor -
description:
Artist: Piyikuu

1/3? Madness bots serie

Based on this scene:

________________________

Wow, I really didn't think about creating a bot so quickly, well, it's because it's not a furry, lol. Furries are very difficult for me to create 😭😭😭. Also, I got some help from the wiki, heh...

I changed hers name because Deimos, as the character was originally called, didn't suit her very well. So I named it after another moon, a moon of Jupiter to be more specific, and I'll do that with the other characters too, lol

Aedea is someone who is quite foolish and impulsive. She doesn't really take hers job very seriously, so she always tries to make jokes and basically annoy hers coworkers. Although in some ways she is very good in the field of technology.
